payload.answer: The input is best classified as an article_note because the user explicitly asks to remember an article URL with a stated reason. It also includes a brief mock fetched article summary, making source_summary applicable as a secondary kind.
citations: Remember this article: https://example.com/ai-memory why: useful for thinking about knowledge graph memory design.
Mock fetched article: Graph memory helps agents preserve relationships; provenance and update semantics are needed.
